title: Maa Tarini Temple, Ghatgaon

overview.short: The Maa Tarini Temple (Odia: ମା ତାରିଣୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) in Ghatgaon, Odisha, India, is a famous temple dedicated to the Hindu goddess Maa Tarini.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Maa Tarini Temple, Ghatgaon?
faq.a: The best time to visit Maa Tarini Temple, Ghatgaon is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Maa Tarini Temple, Ghatgaon?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (127 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (124 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Maa Tarini Temple, Ghatgaon?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Maa Tarini Temple, Ghatgaon at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Maa Tarini Temple, Ghatgaon?
faq.a: Stays in Maa Tarini Temple, Ghatgaon start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
